strengths: 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure engineering
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks)
Founder of open-source platform demonstrating entrepreneurial drive and product ownership
concerns: No demonstrated director-level or principal IC leadership scope advising strategic customers
Limited evidence of deep AI/ML expertise or shipped AI products at scale
No advanced degree in AI and minimal large-cloud platform strategy experience

key_factors.factor: Executive-level influence and customer advisory track record

response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling, but the role targets a director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, shipped AI platforms, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers on cloud and AI strategy. The resume shows craftsmanship and breadth but lacks the AI research depth, large-scale platform leadership, and external thought-leadership footprint expected at the Principal level.
